title: Claude Fable 5 sets a fluid simulation to Beethoven
summary: Claude Fable 5 generated code for a fluid simulation and produced a classical music EDM remix, with the simulation synchronized to the music. This demonstrates the model's multimodal creative capabilities across code generation, music composition, and audiovisual coordination.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 generating code for a fluid simulation and producing a classical music EDM remix, with the visuals synchronized to the audio. It illustrates the model operating across three tasks at once: code generation, music composition, and audio-video coordination. The takeaway is a demonstration of multimodal output where a single model handles both the generated simulation and the Beethoven-based remix it runs against.
